item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n01","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in ordinary execution mode and produced a practical step plan without invoking triage, Anti-Spiral, 3L5S, or a stop condition.
